title: Discovery Call Prep Sheet
description: A one-page preparation sheet to fill in before every discovery call. Ensures you never go into a call unprepared.

sections.title: Prospect Research
sections.description: What you know before the call
fields: What you know about their situation

sections.title: Questions to Ask
fields: Situation question (what does their world look like?)
Impact question (what does this cost them?)

sections.title: Your Positioning
sections.description: How to position your solution for this specific prospect
fields: Proof point or case study to share

howToUse: Fill in the first 3 sections before every call (10-15 minutes of prep). Fill in the Call Outcome section immediately after. Store in your CRM or a shared folder.
